section.heading: Effect of this subchapter on retirement and retired pay

content.p: Except as provided in subsection 3757(b) 11 So in original. Probably should be “section 3757(b)”. of this title, nothing in this subchapter authorizes the retirement of a Reserve officer or the payment of retired, retainer, or severance pay to a Reserve officer; or affects in any manner the law relating to the retirement of, or the granting of retired or retainer pay or other benefits to a Reserve officer.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 795 of this title prior to the complete revision of former chapter 21 of this title by Pub. L. 96–322.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: Pub. L. 115–282, § 118(b), renumbered section 723 of this title as this section.
